TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Mksuzing, title = Mksuzing, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mksuzing} }

S.FORM: alang Mksuzing ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 69 buwan, 161 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 87% kyan ku 140 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 13% kyan ku 21 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 80%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mksuzing hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Mksuzing hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Mksuzing hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mksuzing hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'llaw na Mksuzing hya' ga Mklapay. tay mkyahu' na Mksuzing hya' ga Mknahuy. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Mksuzing ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 69 buwan, 161 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 87% kyan ku 140 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 13% kyan ku 21 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 80%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mksuzing hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Mksuzing hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Mksuzing hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mksuzing hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'llaw na Mksuzing hya' ga Mklapay. tay mkyahu' na Mksuzing hya' ga Mknahuy. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mks~ɕuziŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mks~ɕuziŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na mks~ɕuziŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na mks~ɕuziŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mks~ɕuziŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔllaw na mks~ɕuziŋ ħjaʔ ɣa mklapaj. taj mkjaħuʔ na mks~ɕuziŋ ħjaʔ ɣa mknaħuj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
